context: Evaluates the use of crypto-browserify's randomBytes API to generate cryptographically secure random data. The solution should use randomBytes() synchronously and produce correctly sized output.

checklist.name: Uses randomBytes
checklist.description: The solution calls randomBytes(byteLength) from crypto-browserify to generate random data, not Math.random() or another non-cryptographic source.

checklist.name: Correct token length
checklist.description: generateToken() returns a hex string of exactly byteLength * 2 characters by calling toString('hex') on the resulting Buffer.

checklist.name: Returns Buffer
checklist.description: generateTokenBuffer() returns the raw Buffer object from randomBytes() without converting it to a string.

checklist.name: Synchronous usage
checklist.description: The solution uses randomBytes synchronously (without a callback), returning the value directly.
